title: Late Payment Demand Letter - ExampleCo v Sample Retail
background: ExampleCo supplied software implementation services to Sample Retail under a signed statement of work. Invoice INV-1042 was issued for R48,500 and remains unpaid despite two follow-up emails.
objectives: Request payment of the outstanding invoice
Preserve the commercial relationship if payment is made promptly
Create a clear record of demand before further steps are considered
requestedOutcome: Payment of R48,500 within seven calendar days, or a written proposal for immediate resolution.
customClauses: Keep the tone firm but commercially respectful.
Do not threaten litigation directly; reserve rights instead.
